taxonomy: Grammitis fabispora is classified as a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It belongs to the genus Grammitis, which comprises a group of epiphytic ferns. Grammitis fabispora is native to Central and South America, and is often found growing on trees in humid, tropical environments. The classification of Grammitis fabispora at the kingdom and phylum levels is Plantae and Pteridophyta, respectively. Further classification is also included in the division Pteridophyta, class Polypodiopsida, and order Polypodiales.
